name: Manifold Markets
description: Manifold is a play-money (mana) prediction market with a long tail of weird, niche, and creator-driven markets you won't find on Polymarket or Kalshi. Useful as a third opinion on overlapping topics — when Polymarket, Kalshi, AND Manifold all agree on a probability, that's a strong consensus; when they disagree, the gap is a possibly-tradable signal. No auth needed for read-only access. Trading uses API key auth (deferred to a follow-up — read-only ships first).

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (optional, for trading)
credential_fields.description: From your Manifold account at https://manifold.markets/profile — copy 'API Key'. Optional; only required for placing bets / managing markets. Read-only browsing works without it.

tools.name: list_markets
tools.description: Recent markets, paginated. Each row carries id, slug, question, creatorUsername, createdTime, closeTime, isResolved, outcomeType (BINARY / MULTIPLE_CHOICE / NUMERIC), volume, totalLiquidity. For BINARY markets, probability (0-1) is the current implied YES prob — directly comparable to Polymarket YES prices.

before.description: Pagination — return markets created BEFORE this market id (for older pages).

tools.name: get_market
tools.description: Full detail for one market by id — question, full description (text + JSON), outcomeType, probability, pool sizes, bets count, comments count, resolution (if resolved).

tools.name: get_market_by_slug
tools.description: Same as get_market but by slug (the URL-friendly path) instead of id — useful when you have a URL like 'manifold.markets/foo/will-x-happen-by-2026'.

tools.name: search_markets
tools.description: Search markets by free-text term. Use to find Manifold's take on topics that Polymarket also lists ('biden 2028', 'fed cut march 2026', 'btc 100k'). Compare the implied probabilities to spot price disagreements.

tools.name: list_bets
tools.description: Recent bets across the platform, optionally filtered by marketId or username. Returns id, userId, marketId, outcome, shares, probBefore, probAfter, createdTime, isFilled. Use to follow a specific user's bet flow or read the recent activity on a market.

contractSlug.description: Filter to one market's bets by slug.

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: Comments on markets — public discussion. Sometimes carries useful signal (the comment thread of a niche market often surfaces the actual events that resolve it).

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: User profile by username — id, balance (mana), totalDeposits, profitCached, creatorVolumeCached. Use to assess a user's track record before following their bets.

tools.name: get_groups
tools.description: Topic groups — Manifold's tag system. Browse groups to find clusters of related markets ('AI', 'Politics', 'Crypto', 'Geopolitics').
